name: Eyebrow Label
description: Short uppercase label above product title (e.g. 'Extrait de Parfum')

name: Short Description / Tagline
description: 1–2 sentence tagline shown below product title

name: Poetry Lines
description: Multi-line poetic copy displayed in italic block below tagline

name: Fragrance Notes (JSON)
description: Array of note objects. Format: [{"name":"Bergamot","tier":"top","image":""},{"name":"Oud","tier":"base","image":""}]. tier values: top | heart | base

name: Trust Pills (JSON)
description: Array of badge objects. Format: [{"label":"Cruelty-Free"},{"label":"IFRA Compliant"}]

name: Product Badges (JSON)
description: Overlay badges on gallery image. Format: [{"label":"New","color":"#fff"},{"label":"Bestseller","color":"#gold"}]. color is optional CSS color.

name: Gallery Custom Label
description: Short text overlaid on the main product gallery image (e.g. 'Limited Edition')

name: Top Highlight Bar
description: Single line shown in a prominent highlight bar below poetry (e.g. 'Lasts 12+ hours on skin')

name: Heart Icon Text
description: Short line shown with a heart icon accent below top_highlight bar

name: Product Highlights (JSON)
description: Icon + text highlight rows. Format: [{"icon":"★","text":"Long-lasting sillage"},{"icon":"◈","text":"Skin-safe formula"}]

name: Feature List (JSON)
description: Feature cards shown in a grid. Format: [{"icon":"✦","title":"Natural Ingredients","desc":"100% natural essential oils, no synthetics"},{"icon":"◎","title":"IFRA Compliant","desc":"Internationally certified safe formula"}]

name: Banner Strip Text
description: Full-width text strip shown above tabs (e.g. 'Free shipping on orders above ₹1999')

name: Custom Tabs (JSON)
description:
Additional tabs appended to the product tab bar. Format: [{"label":"Ingredients","content":"

Full ingredients list…

"},{"label":"Certifications","content":"

…

"}]. content supports HTML.

name: FAQ Items (JSON)
description: FAQ accordion items. Format: [{"q":"How long does it last?","a":"Typically 8–12 hours on skin."},{"q":"Is it vegan?","a":"Yes, all formulas are 100% vegan."}]

name: Base Block (Rich Text)
description: Rich text content block rendered after the tabs section. Good for editorial copy, brand story excerpt, or legal disclaimers.

name: Card Tagline
description: Short tagline shown on product cards in collection/featured grids (not the same as short_description_tagline on PDP)

name: Size Label
description: Size string shown on product cards (e.g. '50ml | 1.7 oz'). Falls back to volume_label section setting.
